---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that would help explain the feature.

## Scope

Which part of the project does this affect?
- [ ] Scanner (new recommendation types, detection logic)
- [ ] Scoring (risk model, savings calculation)
- [ ] Executor (new actions, guardrails)
- [ ] Rollback
- [ ] API (new endpoints, contract changes)
- [ ] Desktop App (UI, Tauri shell)
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other
